text.title: On-Call Rotation Setup Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether on-call-rotation-setup applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the service require 24/7 coverage AND team has ≥3 engineers?

branch.conclusion: Run primary + secondary tier with quarterly fairness audit.
Cannot sustain rotation; revisit team size or service SLA.

example.description: When `yes AND mission_critical` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r2` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
